upgrade.title: Applying update
upgrade.applying: Pulling new version and running migrations...
upgrade.successDetail: vaultctl has been updated to v{{version}}. Reload to continue.
upgrade.extensionNote: Don't forget to update your browser extension from the Web Store.
upgrade.notConfigured: In-app upgrade is not configured on this server. See the documentation for VAULTCTL_UPGRADE_HOOK_URL.
upgrade.confirmBody: The server will restart after pulling the new image and running any database migrations. Existing sessions will be preserved. You will be prompted to re-enter your master password to confirm.
